data.title: Casella Waste Systems is remarketing $37.5M in NY State Environmental Facilities Corp Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds.
data.description: Recently in Rutland, Vermont, Casella Waste Systems, Inc. (“Casella”) (NASDAQ:CWST), a company specializing in solid waste, recycling, and resource management services, announced the initiation of the remarketing process for $37.5 million of New York State Environmental Facilities Corporation Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds (Casella Waste Systems, Inc. Project) Series 2020R-1. These bonds were initially issued on September 2, 2020, with a total principal amount of $40.0 million. On September 2, 2025, $2.5 million of the original principal will be redeemed by Casella, while the remaining $37.5 million will be remarketed on the same day.

data.title: Asante Gold Corporation starts trading on TSX Venture Exchange with symbol ASE.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on September 24, 2025, Asante Gold Corporation (TSXV: ASE | GSE: ASG | FRANKFURT:1A9 | OTCQX: ASGOF) shared that their common shares will start trading on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol ASE. This move marks a significant development for the company as it expands its public trading availability.

data.title: Mr. Faysal Rodriguez joins Oroco's Board of Directors, having 25 years of mining experience; a VP at Torex Gold.
data.description: Oroco Resource Corp., a mining company based in Vancouver, Canada, recently appointed Mr. Faysal Rodriguez to its Board of Directors. Rodriguez, with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, currently holds the position of Senior Vice President, Mexico at Torex Gold Resources Inc. During his career, he has worked in various countries and with major mining companies. At Torex Gold, Rodriguez played a crucial role in overseeing operations at the El Limón-Guajes and Media Luna gold mines in the Morelos Complex in Guerrero, Mexico, where he achieved outstanding safety and production records. His expertise in mine development, operations, and community relations will be valuable for Oroco as it progresses with the Santo Tomás copper project. The company trades on the TSX-V as OCO and on the OTCQB as ORRCF.

data.title: Valour launches 13 new ETPs on Spotlight Stock Market, reaching 99 listed ETPs, largest digital asset selection globally.
data.description: Valour is recognized for providing the most extensive range of digital asset ETPs worldwide, with a staggering 99 products now available for trading. This achievement solidifies their position as a leader in the industry.
Wolters Kluwer names Rose Lee and Hikmet Ersek for Supervisory Board nomination.

data.title: InterCure acquires ISHI, enhancing access to US cannabis tech, brands. Milestone for expansion strategy.
data.description: InterCure has reached a significant milestone in its commercial expansion strategy with the acquisition of a prominent cannabis company. This move provides access to top-tier American brands and cutting-edge cultivation technologies. This acquisition underscores InterCure's commitment to growth and innovation in the cannabis industry.

data.title: Nasdaq suspends Apollomics Inc., Ltd. trading at $18.4331 (ordinary shares) and $0.0191 (warrants) on Sept. 17, 2025.
data.description: On September 17, 2025, trading in Apollomics Inc., Ltd. was stopped at 14:37:17 Eastern Time by the Nasdaq Stock Market ® (Nasdaq: NDAQ) for more information from the company. The final price for their ordinary shares was $18.4331 (Nasdaq: APLM), while warrants were at $0.0191 (Nasdaq: APLMW).

data.title: Xcite Resources to carry out brokered offering of life shares & private placement of flow-through shares, while amending agreements for Athabasca Uranium Portfolio.
data.description: A recent report sheds light on the increasing trend of plastic waste pollution in our oceans. It is estimated that over 8 million tons of plastic are dumped into the ocean each year, harming marine life and ecosystems. The report highlights that around 80% of this plastic waste originates from land-based sources, with the top contributing countries being China, Indonesia, the Philippines, Thailand, and Vietnam. Despite efforts to combat this issue, the amount of plastic waste entering the ocean is expected to double by 2025 if urgent action is not taken. This alarming trend underscores the need for global cooperation and effective waste management strategies to mitigate the detrimental impact of plastic pollution on our oceans.

data.title: Bybit reintroduces Daily Treasure Hunt in Oct with Hot Token Rush, allowing users to trade & win; 2nd biggest exchange in trading volume.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on September 26, 2025, Bybit, the cryptocurrency exchange ranked second globally in trading volume, announced the revival of its popular Daily Treasure Hunt starting in October. The latest version, Hot Token Rush, offers users exciting opportunities to engage in trading activities and have a chance to win prizes.

data.title: Trump's proposed 100% drug tariffs could have loopholes lessening impact on consumers, Big Pharma displeased. Asian markets rattled. U.S. investors affected, some companies see premarket shares rise.
data.description: President Donald Trump's plan to impose 100% tariffs on pharmaceuticals may have a smaller effect than originally anticipated due to certain loopholes, although the pharmaceutical industry, notably Big Pharma, remains dissatisfied. Trump's investigation under Section 232 to evaluate whether medical products from China, Vietnam, and Malaysia are a national security threat has resulted in the proposed tariffs. This is likely to impact U.S. consumers and exporters in these nations. Oxford Economics' analyst Louise Loo forecasts that the drug tariffs will significantly impact American consumers. The news has caused a downturn in Asian markets, though some U.S. pharmaceutical companies such as Pfizer, Eli Lilly, and Bristol-Myers Squibb have seen a boost in premarket shares.

data.title: LHV Group acquired own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange during 19-25.09.2025.
data.description: During the week of September 19-25, 2025, LHV Group revealed that it purchased a significant number of its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: The Coordinating Center expands Autism Waiver services to Queen Anne's County, Maryland; a leader in care coordination.
data.description: In Millersville, Maryland on September 26, 2025, The Coordinating Center, a prominent provider of person-centered care coordination, revealed their extension of Autism Waiver Service Coordination offerings to Queen Anne's County. This move highlights The Coordinating Center's commitment to expanding its services to a new area, reinforcing its status as a statewide leader in this field.

data.title: AbbVie submits NDA for Tavapadon to FDA for Parkinson's treatment, backed by Phase 3 data showing improvement.
data.description: Evidence from the Phase 3 TEMPO program, including data from multiple trials, has shown significant improvements in symptoms for Parkinson's disease patients. The positive results from all three Phase 3 trials highlight the potential of tavapadon, a new selective dopamine D1/D5 receptor partial agonist. This promising treatment has shown effectiveness in improving symptoms across the spectrum of Parkinson's disease.

data.title: Sunrise New Energy named a top 11 global supplier of artificial graphite anode materials for energy storage and EV batteries.
data.description: In ZIBO, China on September 26, 2025, Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. revealed that it has earned recognition as one of the top eleven worldwide suppliers of artificial graphite anode materials for energy storage batteries and electric vehicle (EV) batteries. The company, trading on NASDAQ under EPOW, is known for its innovation in this field, showcasing significant progress and technology improvements. This acknowledgment emphasizes Sunrise's impressive growth trajectory and its commitment to enhancing both technology and production capabilities in the industry.
